qa_pairs.question: What is MIKE software, and what are its main areas of application?
qa_pairs.answer: MIKE is a hydraulic and hydrological modeling software package. It is primarily used for FEM (Finite Element Method) and general simulation.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find more information about MIKE software?
qa_pairs.answer: Additional information about MIKE software is available on its official website, typically found at https://www.mikepoweredbydhi.com/mike-[version], where [version] corresponds to the specific software version.
